examples.text: It's found in a wide variety of food and drink. Just check the labels on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar.
examples.explanation: 它广泛存在于各种食物和饮料中。只需检查你购买的甜味产品上的标签。葡萄糖、果糖、蔗糖、麦芽糖、乳糖、右旋糖以及淀粉都是糖的形式。

source.text: 糖类怎样影响大脑 -Nicole Avena
